steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to use the notes to explain what national union federations do. The key detail in the notes is that the MTUC 'helps improve conditions for workers in that nation.'

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The MTUC is one of the national union federations represented by ITUC-Africa.: states which regional federation represents the MTUC but says nothing about the MTUC's purpose. ✗
  • Choice B — The MTUC is a national union federation in Africa.: focuses on how the federation is organized, not what it does for workers. ✗
  • Choice C — National union federations, such as the MTUC, work to improve conditions for workers in their respective nations.: directly states the purpose using the MTUC as the supporting example. ✓
  • Choice D — Regional union federations like ITUC-Africa represent the national union federations in a specific area.: identifies components of the federation rather than explaining its purpose. ✗
C is correct.
